# LeapSwap

> White-label cross-chain Swap / Bridge Widget SDK. Same-chain quotes and chain lists are injected via `swapDataProvider` / `chainsProvider`; the Widget never speaks vendor field names (OpenOcean, KyberSwap, etc.).

LeapSwap is a monorepo forked from the LiFi Widget architecture. Cross-chain routing still aggregates LiFi, Relay, DeBridge, and similar protocols. Same-chain Swap data must be supplied by an integrator package or example-local adapter.

Key facts for agents:
- Required Widget props: `integrator`, `swapDataProvider`, `chainsProvider`
- Do not put OpenOcean/KyberSwap-specific fields into `@leapswap/widget` or `@leapswap/widget-sdk`
- Map vendor APIs inside `@leapswap/business-integrator` or `examples/*/src/integrator`
- Dev: Node >= 20, pnpm 10; `pnpm dev` (OpenOcean :3000), `pnpm dev:kyberswap` (KyberSwap :3001)
- Repo: https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/README.md): Product overview, architecture boundary, quick start
- [OpenOcean integrator package](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/packages/business-integrator/README.md): Reference OpenOcean → generic `SwapDataProvider` mapping
- [OpenOcean example](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/examples/openocean/README.md): Default demo using `business-integrator` (+ Custom stub)
- [KyberSwap example](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/examples/kyberswap/README.md): Self-built integrator (no `business-integrator`)
- [KyberSwap integrator notes](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/examples/kyberswap/src/integrator/README.md): Routes / chains / DefiLlama priceUSD mapping
- [OpenOcean example integrator notes](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/examples/openocean/src/integrator/README.md): Mode switch OpenOcean vs Custom

## Contracts (source of truth)

- [SwapDataProvider types](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/packages/widget/src/types/swapDataProvider.ts): Generic quote / gas / token price contract
- [ChainsProvider](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/packages/widget-sdk/src/services/chains.ts): `() => Promise<ExtendedChain[]>`

## Optional

- [Full LLM context](https://github.com/leap-fi/LeapSwap/blob/master/llms-full.txt): Expanded GEO digest for longer context windows
- [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org/): Spec for this file
